scenarios.title: Agent Frameworks, Tooling, and Sandboxed LLM Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: LLM agent frameworks, browser automation agents, tool calling, graph/state runtimes, hosted or sandbox execution, MCP, CLIs, and production agent operations.
scenarios.role: Use Haystack to build, debug, evaluate, and maintain RAG, agent, pipeline, component, ingestion, retrieval, generator, tool-calling, and observability workflows for the haystack-ai package and repository.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `haystack` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: agents tools and hitl, data ingestion, evaluation and observability, generation and model components, pipelines and components, and 2 other focused workflows.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `haystack` when the request names `haystack`, centers on the haystack-ai package and repository, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in agent frameworks tooling and sandboxed llm workflows. Then route to agents tools and hitl, data ingestion, evaluation and observability, or generation and model components when those focused workflows match.
